purpose: Re-run Run 11's existing 24 candidates (composite >= 0.7, Belinda 3Q PASS) through the 4 strict gates: (G1) threshold 0.90, (G2) quarantine, (G3) cross-LLM verify >=5 web_search, (G4) Belinda strict. Test if any survives.
gate_application_order: G1: threshold 0.90 first (cheapest test, applies to all 24)
G2: quarantine check second (zero web_search cost)
G3: cross-LLM verify third (only candidates passing G1+G2 reach G3)
G4: Belinda strict last (only candidates passing G1+G2+G3 reach G4)

per_candidate_outcome.G2_quarantine: PASS_ADJACENT (PG_E1_A06 same essay as quarantined PG_E1_A05)
per_candidate_outcome.G3_diagnostic: COLLISION (arXiv: TAIS empirical scaling already validates 'AI discovery = superlinear')
per_candidate_outcome.verdict: REJECT (by G1; would also fail G3)

per_candidate_outcome.G3_diagnostic: n/a (gate untriggered, below threshold; topic 'tensor network compression as generalist substrate' is well-covered in MERA/quantum-inspired ML literature)
n/a (gate untriggered, below threshold; first AI-developed mass 2FA zero-day is a Glasswing product claim, not novel inference)

per_candidate_outcome.G2_quarantine: PASS_FLAGGED (atom WS_E7_A06 is verbatim title of arXiv:2405.15943)
per_candidate_outcome.verdict: REJECT (by G1; would also fail G3)
REJECT (by G1; would also fail G3)
REJECT (by G1; would also fail G2 and G4)

summary.n_rejected_by_G1_alone_no_other_gate: 1 (CAND_011_E3_010: G1 fail, G2 pass, no other gate reached)
summary.n_rejected_by_G1_AND_G3_diagnostic: 3 (E4_012, E7_006, E7_009: G1 fail + would have failed G3 diagnostic)
summary.n_rejected_by_G1_AND_G2_AND_G4_diagnosti: 1 (E7_011: G1 fail + G2 fail + diagnostic G4 fail)
secondary_redundant_gates: G4 Belinda strict diagnostic (would catch ~22/24 by Q2 alone)
summary.robustness_of_rejection: STRONG. Even if G1 threshold were lowered to 0.70 (Run 11's threshold), the combined G2+G3+G4 would still reject the vast majority. G2 alone catches 18/24; G3 catches at least 3/6 non-quarantined tested; G4-Q2-strict catches an estimated 22/24.

tool_audit_phase_5.status: PASS (no new web_search; cross-references Phase 3 diagnostic verifies)
